title: 9 Herbal Creams For Upper Abdominal Pain
description: Rosmarinus officinalis creams contains rosmarinic acid, a key bioactive constituent responsible for its medicinal properties. Rosmarinus officinalis creams work by reducing inflammation in the upper abdominal area, which can contribute to pain. The anti-inflammatory properties of rosmarinic acid help to decrease swelling and ease discomfort. Additionally, the compound also has antispasmodic properties, which can help relax the muscles in the abdominal region, further reducing pain. The...
